framework.name: OpenUSD-Based Large-Scale Simulation
framework.description: A method for implementing physically-based simulations at scale using OpenUSD (Universal Scene Description) standards, enabling standardized data exchange and interoperability across different simulation platforms.
implications: Reduces vendor lock-in for simulation workflows
Facilitates collaboration across different simulation tools
framework.raw_quote: Harness the power of large-scale, physically-based OpenUSD simulation

source.title: Industrial Facility Digital Twins—Use Case | NVIDIA
source.author: Unknown
